title: WAI-ARIA 1.2: Label and Described-By Requirements
summary: Every interactive form control must have an accessible name computed from aria-label, aria-labelledby, or associated label element.
supportingClaims: Placeholder text does not serve as an accessible label and disappears on input.
Inputs without labels fail WCAG 3.3.2 (Labels or Instructions) and 2.4.6 (Headings and Labels).
